title: Meeting Summarizer Kit
tagline: Parse meeting transcripts in 4 formats (text/VTT/SRT/Otter JSON), generate a 4-section recap with structured action items (owner + description + due). First-person trick maps 'I'll do X' to current speaker, not literal 'I'. Stub-by-default; one env var swaps to an LLM.
kicker: Meetings · Transcripts · Structured Recaps · Capability Demo
